metadata.title: Seedance 1.0 - Advanced AI Video Generator with Multi-Shot Storytelling | Create 1080p Videos
metadata.description: Seedance 1.0 revolutionizes video creation with native multi-shot storytelling, 1080p cinematic quality, and diverse style expression. Experience Seedance's breakthrough in semantic understanding and prompt following. Generate professional videos from photorealism to cyberpunk with Seedance AI technology. Smooth motion, rich details, precise camera control - all powered by Seedance 1.0's advanced capabilities.
metadata.keywords: Seedance, Seedance 1.0, AI Video Generator, Multi-Shot Storytelling, 1080p Video Creation, Cinematic AI, Video Generation, Seedance AI, Text to Video, Seedance Video Creator, Professional Video AI, Seedance Technology

pricing.title: Seedance 1.0 Pricing Plans - Professional AI Video Generation | Seedance Subscription
pricing.description: Choose your Seedance 1.0 plan for professional video creation. Get unlimited 1080p generations, multi-shot storytelling, cinematic quality, and priority processing with Seedance AI. Experience Seedance's advanced features: smooth motion, diverse styles, precise prompt following. Start with Seedance today.
pricing.keywords: Seedance pricing, Seedance 1.0 plans, Seedance subscription, AI video generation pricing, Seedance professional, Seedance AI pricing, multi-shot video plans, Seedance 1080p pricing

my_credits.title: My Credits
my_credits.rules:
1. Free users get 3 conversations daily, which reset every 24 hours. You'll earn additional 3 conversations for every friend you invite who signs up. 
2. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited conversations and advanced features.

my_invites.title: My Invites
my_invites.invite_tip: Get bonus credits for every friend who signs up through your link.
my_invites.no_orders: You can't invite others before you purchased Seedance premium
my_invites.no_affiliates: You're not allowed to invite others, please contact us to apply for permission.
my_invites.template1:
Hey friends! I just discovered Seedance — the most advanced AI video generator that creates stunning 1080p videos with multi-shot storytelling. The quality is absolutely mind-blowing! Perfect for social media, marketing, or creative projects. You get free credits when you sign up!
👉 Try Seedance now
my_invites.template2:
Want to create amazing videos without filming? Seedance generates professional-quality 1080p videos with cinematic aesthetics from simple text descriptions. I've been using it for my content creation and the results are incredible — saves so much time and money! Get started with free credits.
🚀 Discover Seedance here
my_invites.template3:
Need professional videos for your business? Seedance creates high-quality promotional videos, product demos, and marketing content using advanced AI with 1080p output and multi-shot storytelling. No cameras, no editing skills needed — just describe what you want! Try it with free credits.
💼 Explore Seedance now
